title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Jokihat
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Jokihat assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Jokihat
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Jokihat assembly segment.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Jokihat
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Jokihat constituency.
